span.p:
graph = StateGraph(PipelineState)
graph.add_node('intent_parser', intent_parser_agent)
graph.add_node('ontology_mapper', ontology_mapper_agent)
...
graph.add_edge('intent_parser', 'ontology_mapper')
graph.add_conditional_edges('result_verifier', drift_check)
